    source_gap_key: 'related::Product Launch::AMD::Competitor'
  }
];

const planItems = Array.isArray(incomingPlan) && incomingPlan.length ? incomingPlan : defaultPlanItems;

const sourcePriorityByType = {
  'sec-filings': ['sec-filings', 'company-ir', 'major-news'],
  'market-events': ['press-release', 'company-ir', 'major-news'],
  'price-history': ['price-provider', 'exchange-data']
};

function buildSearchQueries(item) {
  const eventCategory = item.event_category;
  const primary = item.primary_ticker ? `${item.primary_ticker} ` : '';
  const related = item.related_ticker || 'related company';
  const relationship = item.relationship_type ? ` ${item.relationship_type}` : '';
  const sourceType = item.suggested_source_type || 'market-events';
  const sourcePriority = sourcePriorityByType[sourceType] ?? ['major-news'];

  return [
    {
      query_text: `${primary}${eventCategory} ${related}${relationship} historical`.trim(),
      source_type: sourcePriority[0],
      priority: 1,
      notes: `Prefer explicit ${eventCategory} evidence tied to ${related}${relationship ? ` via ${relationship}` : ''}.`
    },
    {
      query_text: `${primary}${related} ${eventCategory} announcement press release historical`.trim(),
      source_type: sourcePriority[Math.min(1, sourcePriority.length - 1)],
      priority: 2,
      notes: 'Prefer primary-source announcements or filing-linked source pages.'
    }
  ];
}

const items = [];
for (const item of planItems) {
  if (item.source_gap_key === 'price::TTM') continue;
  const suggestedSourceType = item.suggested_source_type || 'market-events';
  const searchQueries = buildSearchQueries(item);
  for (const query of searchQueries) {
    items.push({
      json: {
        source_gap_key: item.source_gap_key,
        priority_rank: item.priority_rank,
        priority_score: item.priority_score ?? item.planner_score ?? null,
        gap_score: item.gap_score ?? item.notes?.audit_gap_score ?? null,
        event_category: item.event_category,
        target_type: item.target_type,
        primary_ticker: item.primary_ticker ?? null,
        related_ticker: item.related_ticker ?? null,
        relationship_type: item.relationship_type ?? null,
        desired_sample_count: item.desired_sample_count ?? item.desired_min_sample_size ?? 0,
        current_sample_count: item.current_sample_count ?? item.current_sample_size ?? 0,
        gap_size: item.gap_size ?? 0,
        why_this_slice_matters: item.why_this_slice_matters ?? item.why_it_matters ?? '',
        suggested_source_type: suggestedSourceType,
        suggested_source_priority: sourcePriorityByType[suggestedSourceType] ?? ['major-news'],
        search_query: query,
        source_candidates: [],
        collected_examples: [],
        review_status: 'pending_research',
        reviewer_notes: ''
      }
    });
  }
}
return items;
